mapper.select: select lastqty from t_scm_barcode where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y' and rownum = 1
mapper.update: update t_wms_location set useyn = 'N', memo_d = #{dmemo}, ymdhms_d=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_wms_inbound ( sdate, barcode, ymdhms, loginid, itemcode, bdate, seq, qty,
source, storage, factory, invoiceno, custcode,
custname ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid}, #{itemcode}, #{bdate}, #{seq}, #{qty},
#{source}, #{storage}, #{factory}, #{memo}, NVL((SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_MI_PRICE_BUYCUST WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode} ORDER BY CONDATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), ''), (SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE cu_code = (NVL((SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_MI_PRICE_BUYCUST WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode} ORDER BY CONDATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), ''))) )

insert into t_wms_location ( sdate, ymdhms, location, barcode, itemcode, qty, memo, loginid, factory, storage, rack, module, levelcode, position, source, okyn ) values( #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{location}, #{barcode}, #{itemcode}, #{qty}, #{memo}, #{loginid}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{rack}, #{module}, #{levelcode}, #{position}, #{source}, #{okyn} )

INSERT INTO t_wms_stock ( sdate, kind, barcode, inqty, outqty, qty, itemcode, ymdhms, factory, storage, mainkind, loginid, insdate ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{source}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, 0, #{qty}, #{itemcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{factory}, #{storage}, #{main}, #{loginid}, #{date} )
mapper.select: select cu_code||'_'||cu_sangho from c_cust where chk_buy =1 order by cu_sangho
